overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in heavy fur clothing walking through a foggy, marshy forest at dusk. The clip transitions from ground-level exploration through dead trees and mist to a dramatic upward tilt revealing an ominous orange and purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty swamp trail with scattered dead trees

events.description: player character moves out of frame to the left as camera continues forward

agents.ego_description: player character in heavy fur coat walking steadily through the marshy terrain, surveying the foggy surroundings

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail through wetland grass and shallow water
sparse dead trees with brown leaves standing in the mist
decaying wooden logs partially submerged in the marsh
thick low-lying fog reducing visibility throughout the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a player character in heavy clothing walking through a foggy swamp. Sparse dead trees line the path while fallen logs rest in the marshy water to the right. Around 15 seconds, the character moves out of the left side of the frame as the camera continues moving forward through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marshland approaching distant light source

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the swamp toward the source of the orange glow on the horizon

entered.detail: ominous orange and red light visible through the trees suggesting fire or sunset

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward through the marsh without the character in view. The path remains centered while the surrounding trees recede into the distance. An ominous orange glow becomes visible on the horizon through the mist, growing slightly brighter as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest canopy view with dramatic sunset sky

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing bright orange and purple sky through silhouetted trees

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera upward to observe the dramatic sky and distant light source through the trees

entered.detail: vibrant orange and purple clouds backlit by intense light creating an ominous atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts sharply upward, transitioning from the ground-level swamp view to a dramatic perspective looking through silhouetted pine trees at a vibrant orange and purple sky. The mist appears as a layer below the tree canopy, and the intense backlighting creates dark silhouettes of the branches against the fiery clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, foggy swamp that culminates in a dramatic reveal of a fiery twilight sky. It begins by following a character in heavy clothing through a marshy landscape of sparse dead trees and fallen logs, before the character exits the frame to the left. As the camera continues moving forward alone through the mist, the surrounding trees recede and an ominous orange glow begins to emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera tilts sharply upward, piercing through the canopy of silhouetted pine trees. Finally, the perspective opens fully to reveal a vibrant orange and purple sky, with the mist settling as a low layer beneath the dark, backlit branches.
